---
title: "Assignments"
toc: false
---

This page collects the **public-facing course work** — the weekly
exit tickets you can pick up and review. Each exit ticket is also
linked from its weekly notes page (look for *Assignments this week*
near the bottom).

**Quizzes, homework, grades, official due dates, project submissions,
and answer keys live in Blackboard.** The public site is a reading and
review layer, not the official gradebook or submission system.

## Public exit tickets by week

Each week has a short **Monday** and **Wednesday** exit ticket (PDF):

- **Week 1** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week01_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week01_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 2** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week02_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week02_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 3** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week03_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week03_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 4** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week04_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week04_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 5** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week05_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week05_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 6** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week06_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week06_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 7** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week07_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week07_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 8** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week08_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week08_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 9** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week09_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week09_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 10** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week10_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week10_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 11** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week11_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week11_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 12** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week12_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week12_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 13** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week13_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week13_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 14** — [Monday](../assets/assignments/week14_monday_exit_ticket_student.pdf) · [Wednesday](../assets/assignments/week14_wednesday_exit_ticket_student.pdf)
- **Week 15** — no exit ticket; the [final-review notes](../notes/week15-final-review.qmd) are the week's material.
